hero.description: The first Moroccan Legal AI. Get instant answers about Moudawana (Family Law), Penal Code, Labor Law, Real Estate, and Business setup.
hero.descriptionEn: Available in Arabic, French, English, and Darija.

chat.userQuestion: What is the penalty for theft in Morocco?
chat.aiResponse: According to the Moroccan Penal Code (Articles 505-534), simple theft is punishable by imprisonment from 1 to 5 years. If there is breaking or violence, the penalty can reach 10-20 years...

features.sectionDescription: Specialized AI legal assistant covering: Contracts, Inheritance, Divorce, Property Law, and Commercial disputes.
features.expertDesc: Trained on Official Bulletins, Court of Cassation rulings, and Moroccan Royal Dahirs.
features.multilingualDesc: Fluent in Arabic, French, English, and Darija.
features.instantDesc: Get legal information in seconds, not days.
features.sourcesDesc: Every answer is backed by legal sources and specific legal articles.
features.secureDesc: Your conversations are encrypted and never shared with third parties.
features.freeDesc: Basic access is free forever. No credit card required.

howItWorks.step1Desc: Type your legal question in any language you prefer.
howItWorks.step2Desc: We analyze your question and search through thousands of legal documents.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Receive an accurate answer with supporting legal sources.

cta.title: Ready to Get
cta.description: Join thousands of users who get instant legal guidance on Moroccan law.

footer.description: Your AI-powered Moroccan law assistant. Get instant answers about legal matters, procedures, and rights in Arabic, French, English, and Darija.

aboutUs.title: Democratizing
aboutUs.subtitle: We built 9anon AI because legal knowledge should not be a privilege. It is a fundamental right. Our mission is to make the entire corpus of Moroccan law instantly accessible, perfectly accurate, and completely free.
aboutUs.philosophyOldDesc: Finding legal answers meant paying expensive consultation fees, digging through dense Dahirs, or trusting unreliable online forums.
aboutUs.philosophyNewDesc: Instant, accurate legal intelligence. Powered by an AI engine trained exclusively on official Moroccan jurisprudence.
aboutUs.techDesc: General AI hallucinates. 9anon AI does not. Our proprietary architecture isolates Moroccan legal data to guarantee absolute precision.
aboutUs.techFeature1Desc: Ingesting every single article from the Official Bulletin of the Kingdom of Morocco.
aboutUs.techFeature2Desc: Trained on decades of precedence and rulings from the highest courts.
aboutUs.techFeature3Desc: We do not store or read your legal queries. Your privacy is structurally guaranteed.
